default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on renewal terms amid Superhuman's post-acquisition restructuring.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Renewal Blocked by Budget:** Superhuman's renewal is blocked by budget uncertainty. The team needs flexibility beyond the standard 12-month contract to balance agency spend against other internal priorities (e.g., headcount).](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [**Strategy Shift:** The Mail blog strategy must now support the new `superhuman.com` suite. The goal is to recover Mail's brand-keyword traffic, which was lost in the recent site relaunch, while building clear upgrade paths to the full suite.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [**Content ROI is the Key:** GrowthX's content refresh program is driving strong non-branded traffic (e.g., 12k+ clicks) and market-leading LLM visibility (27% vs. Missive's 2%). Proving this traffic converts to signups is now critical to justify the agency investment.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=1312.0)
  - [**Conversion Tracking is the Gap:** Superhuman lacks per-URL conversion tracking, making it impossible to prove the content's ROI. Finding a workaround is the top priority for the renewal decision.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)

## Topics

### Superhuman's Post-Acquisition Context

  - [**Internal Flux:** The organization is restructuring post-acquisition, with new teams and a refined budget (for FY27) creating significant uncertainty.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [**New Content Model:** The Growth Content team (Jess) now manages strategy across all business units (BUs), coordinating with the Product/Demand Gen team (Erica's team).](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [**Primary Goal:** Optimize the new `superhuman.com` suite funnel to drive engagement and adoption.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)

### Strategic Challenge: Mail's Performance & Funnel

  - [**Traffic Shift:** The `superhuman.com` relaunch redirected brand-keyword traffic from Mail to the suite homepage, causing a performance hit.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
  - [**Non-Branded Growth:** Mail's non-branded organic traffic and visibility continue to grow.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
  - [**Strategic Goal:**](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
      - [Recover Mail's brand-keyword traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=855.0)
      - [Build clear upgrade paths from Mail to the full suite.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
      - [Route high-intent users to the correct funnel efficiently.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)

### GrowthX's Performance & Proposed Strategy

  - [**Content Refresh Program:** A program to update 60+ bottom-of-funnel (BOFU) articles is driving strong results.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
      - [**Traffic:** \>12k non-branded clicks (Feb–Dec) from GrowthX content.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
      - [**Key Driver:** Comparison posts (e.g., "Best Superhuman Mail Alternatives") capture existing demand and allow Superhuman to dictate the narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)
  - [**AI Visibility (AEO):** Comparison posts are a key driver for LLM citations.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
      - [**Result:** Mail has 27% LLM visibility, leading the market (vs. Missive's 2%).](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [**Proposed Q1 Strategy:** Continue the refresh program and add new content to fill AI visibility gaps and optimize for mid-funnel problems.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)

### Renewal Discussion & Conversion Tracking Gap

  - [**Renewal Block:** Superhuman cannot commit to a 12-month contract due to budget uncertainty and the need to weigh agency spend against other priorities like headcount.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Position:** The standard is a 12-month agreement. A flexible retainer model was proposed, allowing Superhuman to apply content resources across BUs as needed.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [**Critical Gap:** Superhuman lacks per-URL conversion tracking, preventing them from proving the content's ROI and justifying the agency investment.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)
      - [**Jess:** Has an email from Alex with some conversion data, possibly an average or by content type.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
      - [**Morgan:** Believes per-URL tracking is not set up and would require engineering resources.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jess:** Send Morgan the email from Alex with blog conversion data.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [**Morgan:** Review the data to determine if per-URL tracking exists or if engineering is required.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=1616.0)
  - [**GrowthX:** Prepare a proposal with renewal options and present it early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/AyQTRqfHpoPqy6sb8dzz85DHLkDoLHxu?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)

action_items.description: Send Marcel Airtable PSCO strategy video link to Jo
Send Alex's blog conversion data (URL-level) to Morgan + Jo
Send renewal options + proposal to Jess (cc Morgan)
